app.name: CareerDocs AI
app.description: Stop spending hours writing cover letters and recommendation letters. CareerDocs AI creates HR-compliant, professionally formatted documents from structured inputs — no prompt writing required.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Generate and manage your professional HR documents.
dashboard.noDocumentsDesc: Generate your first document to see it here.
dashboard.createMotivation: Generate a professional cover letter for a job application
dashboard.createRecommendation: Create a formal recommendation letter for a colleague

landing.feature1Desc: Generate professional cover letters tailored to specific roles and companies with AI precision.
landing.feature2Desc: Create HR-compliant recommendation letters that highlight candidate strengths effectively.
landing.feature3Desc: All documents follow professional HR writing standards with A4 PDF export.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to create your first document?
landing.ctaDesc: No prompts. No templates. Just structured inputs and professional outputs.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to receive product updates, new features and AI improvements.

motivation.title: Motivation Letter Generator
motivation.subtitle: Fill in your details below and generate a professional cover letter.
motivation.noDocumentDesc: Fill in the form and click Generate to preview your motivation letter

recommendation.title: Recommendation Letter Generator
recommendation.subtitle: Create a professional recommendation letter for a colleague or team member.
recommendation.recommenderInfoDesc: Your details as the person writing the recommendation
recommendation.candidateInfoDesc: Details about the person being recommended
recommendation.noDocumentDesc: Fill in the form and click Generate to preview your recommendation letter

history.title: Document History
